posts.author: Louisehkansson (Louise)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In my dashboard, I would like to be able to see sub-items only without the main items connected to the sub-item showing up as well.

What are you trying to achieve

Working with campaigns as part of an overall marketing plan - I use dashboards to look at specific information from the campaigns (main item), for example events (sub-item) done within the campaigns. Then the main item counts as well, not just the sub-item and the reporting is not accurate.
